name: VS Touch
known_for: The reference natural gut — the softest, liveliest string made, and the gold standard for comfort and tension stability.
claim: Claims elite power, sensitivity and tension maintenance from a high-grade cow-gut construction.

name: Natural Gut
known_for: Federer's mains string. Explosive pocketing power with huge comfort; the classic gut half of a gut/poly hybrid.
claim: Claims maximum power, feel and shock absorption.

name: Natural Gut
known_for: Premium gut tuned to pair with Luxilon polys in hybrids — a touch crisper than most guts.
claim: Claims tour-level power with reliable tension maintenance.

name: X-One Biphase
known_for: The premium 'gut-alternative' multi — arm-friendly power that many use as the soft half of a hybrid.
claim: Claims gut-like comfort and power with better value and durability.

name: NXT
known_for: A benchmark comfort multi — plush, powerful, forgiving. A go-to for players with arm issues.
claim: Claims premium comfort and power close to natural gut.

name: Sensation
known_for: A softer, all-day comfort multi at a friendlier price.
claim: Claims soft, cushioned feel for touch and comfort.

name: Velocity MLT
known_for: A well-rounded comfort multi that balances feel and durability better than most.
claim: Claims lively power with all-court comfort.

name: NRG2
known_for: An ultra-soft multi prized for shock absorption and touch.
claim: Claims maximum comfort and elasticity.

name: Rexis
known_for: A modern comfort multi with a crisp, controlled feel unusual for the category.
claim: Claims soft comfort with more control than typical multis.

name: Xcel
known_for: A powerful, cushioned multi favored by comfort-seeking club players.
claim: Claims high power and comfort with a soft response.

name: Premier Touch
known_for: One of the plushest multis available — pure touch and arm comfort.
claim: Claims exceptional softness and feel.

name: Silk
known_for: A soft, silky multi aimed squarely at comfort players.
claim: Claims smooth, comfortable power.

name: Synthetic Gut w/ Duraflex
known_for: The default value string — a dependable, do-everything nylon most shops sell by the reel.
claim: Claims all-round performance and durability for the price.

name: Synthetic Gut Power
known_for: The classic beginner/intermediate all-rounder — cheap, reliable, no drama.
claim: Claims balanced power and durability.

name: OG-Sheep Micro
known_for: A cult-favorite budget nylon known for punching above its price on feel.
claim: Claims soft feel and good value.

name: ALU Power
known_for: The most-used poly in pro tennis — the benchmark for crisp, connected control with just enough pop.
claim: Claims precision, control and a lively response with an aluminium-infused co-poly.

name: 4G
known_for: The tension-maintenance king — holds its stringbed stiffness longer than almost anything.
claim: Claims class-leading tension stability and durability.

name: Poly Tour Pro
known_for: An unusually arm-friendly poly — smooth and comfortable while still controlled.
claim: Claims a softer, more comfortable poly response.

name: Poly Tour Strike
known_for: A firmer, more precise poly for flat, aggressive hitters who want a locked-in bed.
claim: Claims direct, controlled power for hard hitters.

name: Razor Code
known_for: A control poly with surprising comfort — a favorite for players who find most polys too harsh.
claim: Claims control and durability with a softer, arm-friendly feel.

name: Confidential
known_for: Solinco's softest control poly — precise but easier on the arm than Tour Bite.
claim: Claims premium control with a comfortable, muted feel.

name: Lynx Tour
known_for: A smooth, controlled all-round poly used by many Head-sponsored pros as a base.
claim: Claims a blend of control, comfort and spin.

name: Hawk Touch
known_for: A soft, comfort-oriented poly for players stepping up from multifilament.
claim: Claims poly control with multifilament-like comfort.

name: Element
known_for: Luxilon's soft, warm poly — control with noticeably more give for sensitive arms.
claim: Claims a softer, more comfortable poly with good spin.

name: Cream
known_for: One of the softest polys on the market — famous for comfort with real spin.
claim: Claims elite comfort for a co-poly with strong spin.

name: Silverstring
known_for: A thin, crisp control poly beloved by string enthusiasts for its clean pocketing.
claim: Claims precise control and comfortable crispness.

name: RPM Blast
known_for: Nadal's string. An octagonal spin monster — heavy topspin, aggressive control, firm feel.
claim: Claims maximum spin and control from a shaped, low-friction co-poly.

name: Hyper-G
known_for: A cult-favorite spin/control poly — bright green, biting spin, easy on the wallet.
claim: Claims elite spin and control with a soft-for-poly feel.

name: Tour Bite
known_for: A square-shaped, ultra-biting spin string for players who swing fast and hard.
claim: Claims maximum spin and razor control.

name: ALU Power Rough
known_for: The textured ALU — the crosses in many pro hybrids (incl. reported Federer/Djokovic setups) for extra bite.
claim: Claims ALU control with added spin from a roughened surface.

name: Sonic Pro Edge
known_for: A budget-friendly shaped spin poly with crisp control.
claim: Claims strong spin and control from a co-poly.

name: Black Code
known_for: A pentagonal spin poly with a comfortable edge — spin without the harshest sting.
claim: Claims spin and control with more comfort than most shaped polys.

name: Poly Tour Rev
known_for: A soft-shaped spin poly — big snapback spin with a more comfortable feel.
claim: Claims explosive spin with a smooth response.

name: Cyclone
known_for: A gear-shaped spin poly that's a perennial best-value spin pick.
claim: Claims great spin and control at a low price.

name: Focus Hex
known_for: A six-sided budget spin poly with a loyal enthusiast following.
claim: Claims strong spin and control at a bargain price.

name: Hyperion
known_for: A shaped spin poly praised for comfort-to-spin ratio at a low cost.
claim: Claims spin and control with reasonable comfort.

name: Barb Wire
known_for: An aggressively-shaped spin string for extreme, heavy topspin games.
claim: Claims tour-level spin and bite.

name: Caviar
known_for: A newer enthusiast-darling spin poly with a crisp, snappy response.
claim: Claims high spin and lively control.

name: Solstice Power
known_for: A shaped poly that leans a bit more toward pop than most spin strings.
claim: Claims spin and control with added power.

name: Pro Hurricane Tour
known_for: A durable, firm control poly — the older-school tour workhorse before RPM.
claim: Claims control and durability for aggressive baseliners.

name: Pro Line Evolution
known_for: A dependable, firm control poly popular with stringers for value and consistency.
claim: Claims durable control at a low price.

name: Kevlar
known_for: For chronic string-breakers only — nearly indestructible, extremely stiff, almost always used as hybrid mains.
claim: Claims the ultimate durability for players who shred everything else.

name: MonoGut ZX
known_for: A rare non-poly monofilament — soft and durable, a comfort control option for arm-sensitive players.
claim: Claims poly-like control and durability with far more comfort.

name: Tour M8
known_for: TennCom's top-ranked all-rounder. An octagonal control poly that's soft-yet-crisp, hugely durable, and does everything at an 8/10 level.
claim: Claims elite tension maintenance and snapback longevity with a plush-but-connected feel.

name: Tour Sniper
known_for: A pentagonal control poly billed as a softer, shaped ALU Power — comes partially pre-stretched so it barely loses tension.
claim: Claims silky feel, low launch and control 'to the max' with minimal notching.

name: Alpha
known_for: Tour Sniper's softer 'sister' — a little more power and give while keeping strong directional control.
claim: Claims a softer feel with added power and precise control.

name: Tour Mako
known_for: A round, power-and-feel Tour poly with a mildly abrasive surface for spin and a predictable launch.
claim: Claims new non-metallic additives for feel, durability and spin with a consistent trajectory.

name: Soldier
known_for: A sharp seven-sided spin poly for big hitters who want maximum stability and playing life.
claim: Claims class-leading tension maintenance and higher spin than Sniper or M8.

name: Paradox Pro
known_for: A metal-infused 'new generation' poly that's counter-intuitively solid, accurate, powerful AND comfortable at once.
claim: Claims a vintage precise feel with unusual comfort, power and durability combined.

name: Black Knight
known_for: A muted six-sided control poly with exceptional directional and depth control — softer than most tension-holding polys.
claim: Claims elite control and depth for high-racket-speed players; string a touch lower than usual.

name: Firewire
known_for: A triangular red string rated #1 in spin for three years — one of the biggest ball-bites in the industry.
claim: Claims maximum ball bite and tension stability with a crisp but arm-friendly feel.

name: Ghost Wire
known_for: Lab-tested as one of the softest co-polys made — round, slick, and a superb arm-friendly hybrid cross.
claim: Claims super-soft, arm-friendly play with maximum durability and tension stability.

name: Tour Status
known_for: An eight-sided all-rounder — Tru Pro's most balanced string for power and control.
claim: Claims a perfectly balanced blend of power, control and spin.

name: Pure Rush
known_for: A lively six-sided poly with extra pop, spin and feel — a softer, more powerful take on Black Knight.
claim: Claims added power, spin and feel with good comfort.

name: Atomos
known_for: A notably plush 'flower-shaped' spin poly — more spin than Black Knight with standout comfort.
claim: Claims high spin with an unusually plush, comfortable feel.

name: O-Toro
known_for: Toroline's most popular string — a hexagonal spin poly with above-average comfort and tension maintenance.
claim: Claims the most spin-friendly Toroline profile with comfort and tension hold above the co-poly average.

name: O-Toro Tour
known_for: A firmer, control-first O-Toro for big hitters who want precision on full swings.
claim: Claims pinpoint accuracy and control on aggressive cuts.

name: Wasabi
known_for: A square, four-edged spin monster that bites hard while staying comfortable for its class.
claim: Claims heavy spin from sharp edges with a comfortable response.

name: Wasabi X
known_for: A softer, ultra-slick Wasabi — great in a full bed and a top hybrid cross for explosive snapback.
claim: Claims a slick low-friction surface for snapback with a softer feel.

name: Toro Toro
known_for: A slick six-sided all-court poly that balances spin and control with a comfortable, lively feel.
claim: Claims a well-rounded spin/control response for all-court play.

name: Truffle X
known_for: Toroline's softest, most elastic string — a breakthrough non-polyester polymer built for comfort and pocketing.
claim: Claims unmatched feel and comfort; pair with a slick poly for plush power and snapback.

name: Zero
known_for: A hexagonal spin-and-power specialist with a signature snapback coating and best-in-class tension maintenance.
claim: Claims explosive snapback spin and power with superior tension hold.

name: Sync
known_for: A round control string that gets ~80% of ALU Power's feel with far better durability — a favorite modern hybrid cross.
claim: Claims ALU-like pocketing and crispness with a slick coating for snapback and long life.

name: Vivo
known_for: A firm hexagonal control/spin poly made from recycled polyester — compared favorably to Lynx Tour and Hyper-G.
claim: Claims direct feedback, gripping spin and superior tension hold from a sustainable material.

name: Firestorm
known_for: A round, arm-friendly control poly that's a value-pick base string for comfort-minded players.
claim: Claims comfortable control with reliable durability at a low price.

name: Big Hitter Black 7
known_for: A German-made, 7-sided co-poly repeatedly rated among the highest-spin strings ever tested — big bite with mid-range power and a softer-than-usual poly feel.
claim: Claims maximum spin and pinpoint accuracy without the harshness of a stiff poly, at a budget price.

name: Big Hitter Silver 7 Tour
known_for: Black 7's firmer sibling — a 7-sided spin string awarded best-in-class tension maintenance by TWU labs, for players who want spin that holds its stiffness.
claim: Claims elite tension maintenance with top-tier spin and precise control.
